brand.name: Dahlia Milano
brand.tagline: This is not just a pizza restaurant. This is the coolest place in the city.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none uppercase
hierarchy.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[#FF3B22] font-bold

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Asymmetry, High Contrast. Never fill the screen uniformly. Use bento grids with empty spaces.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento 'Tetris' Grid (Mode A) for showcase, dense grids for menus.

motion_guidelines.reveals: Framer Motion for staggered text reveals (upward mask) and image scale-ins.
motion_guidelines.hover_effects: Image zoom on hover (scale 1.05, duration 0.6s). Buttons should have an underline expansion or subtle lift.
motion_guidelines.micro_interactions: Floating pizza slice or flower stickers that follow scroll slightly (parallax).

ui_components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges or subtle 4px radius. Primary action in Tomato Red (#FF3B22) with white text. Hover state must increase brightness and translate-y-1.
ui_components.cards: Cardless approach or 1px border (#2E2C2A) with no background, allowing the dark theme to breathe.
ui_components.forms: Use Shadcn customized. Transparent backgrounds for inputs with solid bottom border, or soft dark fills (#1A1918) with focus rings in Tomato Red.
ui_components.stickers: Absolute positioned, rotation slightly skewed. Use the playful script font (Caveat) and bright yellow/pink colors to inject 'Funny/Student' vibe into the editorial layout.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.style: Fixed, Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl, bg-[#0D0C0B]/60, border-b border-white/10). Minimal links. 'Book a Table' CTA in Tomato Red.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.layout: Cinematic visual impact. Full viewport height. Background image (hero_pizza) with a dark gradient overlay (from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent).
sections.content: Massive H1 'DAHLIA MILANO' overlapping the image. Playful script 'Ciao Bella!' floating as a sticker. Subtitle: 'This is not just a pizza restaurant. This is the coolest place in the city.'
sections.interaction: Scroll down indicator with pulsing animation.

sections.name: Marquee Divider
sections.content: Continuous scrolling text (react-fast-marquee) reading 'APERITIVO • DJ SETS • PIZZA NAPOLETANA • MILANO NO. 1' in Bebas Neue, text-[#FF3B22] outline or solid.

sections.name: Signature Pizza Showcase
sections.content: Left: Large vertical image (pizza_two) spanning 2 rows. Right: Menu highlights in raw text with prices. Use hovering image reveals for menu items. 'Student-friendly but not cheap-looking' aesthetic.
sections.stickers: Add a 'Buonissimo!' script sticker over the pizza image.

sections.name: Bar & Drinks Experience
sections.content: Focus on the Negroni image (cocktail_negroni). Dark, moody. 'Nights that turn into mornings.' Highlight cocktail specials and party atmosphere.

sections.name: Events & Nightlife
sections.layout: Overlapping collage layout breaking the grid.
sections.content: Images of nightlife (nightlife_friends, nightlife_dj). Schedule of events: 'Thursday: Student Night', 'Friday: International DJs', 'Saturday: Sports & Beats'.
sections.interaction: Parallax scroll on the images. High contrast text.

sections.name: Social Proof & Reservation
sections.layout: Two-column grid. Left: Social proof / Instagram styled text 'They say we are crazy. We say we are Dahlia.' Right: Reservation form.
sections.form_details: Frontend only. Shadcn form components (Date, Time, Guests). On submit -> Sonner Toast 'Table booked! See you at the party.'

sections.name: Footer
sections.content: Giant brand typography 'DAHLIA' taking up 80vw. Links to socials, address in Milano. Footer must feel premium and memorable.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling in the main layout.
Use Framer Motion for text reveals and image scale-in on scroll.
Use react-fast-marquee for the marquee divider.
Do NOT use standard card components; build custom bento layouts using HTML/Tailwind.
Adhere strictly to the color palette. No purple/violet gradients.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Ensure all images have alt tags and are optimized with object-cover.
Do NOT use generic restaurant templates. Focus on editorial typography (Bebas Neue + Cormorant Garamond) combined with raw, moody imagery.
